productDisplayName: Maxima Attivo Men Silver Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel oval case Dial style: Silver dial with green hands and green highlight at the hour marks Strap style: Stainless steel bracelet strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark, date aperture on the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Guarantee: 1 year
